description: You are a Performance Analyst at a managed cloud hosting company. A major customer reported intermittent latency spikes. Create a Graphite dashboard named 'Outlier Detection' to triage infrastructure components by filtering noise from signal. The dashboard must include three graphs with exact, case-sensitive titles: 'Most Deviant Metrics' with target `aliasByNode(mostDeviant(servers.*.cpu.*, 3), 1)`; 'High Utilization Filter' with target `currentAbove(servers.ec2_instance_*.cpu.*, 15)`; and 'Fleet CPU Envelope' containing the targets `maxSeries(servers.ec2_instance_*.cpu.*)` and `minSeries(servers.ec2_instance_*.cpu.*)`. Save the dashboard when complete.
